abilities.name: Scaled Protectors
abilities.flavor: The saurus bodyguard know no other purpose than to follow and protect their Sunblood leader until their dying breath.
abilities.effect: While this unit includes a Sunblood , ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit each phase and add 1 to this unit’s control score .

abilities.name: Savage Bellow
abilities.flavor: The Sunblood looses a fearsome bellow, inspiring a fearsome savagery in his warriors.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target and roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, the target’s weapons have Crit (2 Hits) for the rest of the turn, including Companion weapons.

abilities.name: Sun Acolytes
abilities.flavor: The Sun Acolytes that accompany a Spawn of Chotec carry out complex tasks upon the battlefield safe in the knowledge that the salamander serves as a deadly deterrent to would be attackers.
abilities.effect: This unit has a crew of 3 Sun Acolytes that are tokens . Add 1 to this unit’s control score for each Sun Acolyte it has. If this unit has no Sun Acolytes , it has a maximum control score of 1. Each time you make an unmodified save roll of 1 for this unit, remove 1 of its Sun Acolytes from the battlefield after the Attack ability has been resolved (the damage point is still inflicted).

abilities.name: Ordered Cohorts
abilities.flavor: Devoted servants of the Old Ones, Saurus Warriors are as intractable in defence as they are relentless upon the attack.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for this unit while it is contesting an objective you control .

abilities.flavor: Devoted servants of the Old Ones, Saurus Warriors are as intractable in defence as they are relentless upon the attack.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for this unit while it is contesting an objective you control .

abilities.name: Nerve-Shredding Screeches
abilities.flavor: The shrill cries of a Terrawing flock can cause disarray across the enemy line.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Star-Venom
abilities.flavor: The blowdarts used by the Hunters of Huanchi are coated in deadly toxins.
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by attacks made with this unit’s Dartpipe to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Chameleon Ambush
battleTraits.summary: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units
battleTraits.effect: Set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" from all enemy units.
